problem id: 08615ada
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01001000 -> 00101001
  01101111 -> 10110001
  11000010 -> 00010000
  10011100 -> 01100011
  00010111 -> 01011110
  11010001 -> 01011110
  01101001 -> 10101001
  11010010 -> 01010010
  11011001 -> 01111111
  00000101 -> 00010100

query: 10111110
predicted answer: 11101111
